payload.startup_idea: FAST BookSwap: a campus marketplace for used books, notes, and study materials.
FAST BookSwap: a campus marketplace for used books, notes, and study materials.
requirements: Create a clean HTML landing page
Include title, subtitle, features, and CTA button
Prepare code for GitHub commit and PR

payload.startup_idea: FAST BookSwap: a campus marketplace for used books, notes, and study materials.
FAST BookSwap: a campus marketplace for used books, notes, and study materials.
payload.target_users: FAST students who want to buy, sell, or exchange used books, notes, and study materials.
payload.problem_statement: Students often struggle to find affordable and relevant academic resources within campus.
payload.value_proposition: A simple campus marketplace for exchanging study materials quickly and affordably.
core_features: Post books and notes for sale or exchange
Search and filter by course, semester, and category
Direct contact between buyers and sellers
Simple listing cards for easy browsing
user_flow: User signs in with campus identity
User posts an item or contacts a seller

payload.tagline: Buy, Sell, and Swap Study Materials — All Within FAST.
payload.social_post: Tired of expensive textbooks? 📚 FAST BookSwap lets you buy, sell, and exchange books and notes with fellow students. Join the waitlist today!
payload.cold_email:
Subject: Introducing FAST BookSwap

Hi there,

We're launching FAST BookSwap — a simple campus marketplace for students to exchange books, notes, and study materials.

Save money and help fellow students succeed.

Join the waitlist today.

Best,
FAST BookSwap Team
payload.slack_message:
*FAST BookSwap Launch 🚀*
Buy, sell, and exchange study materials within campus.
Join the waitlist and start saving today!

payload.feedback: Landing page should include contact email and stronger CTA button. | Marketing copy can include urgency like limited-time access.

payload.task: Revise landing page based on QA feedback
